title: Collaboration
description: Settings for real-time collaboration features in Jupyter Notebook v7.

enableCollaboration.title: Enable collaboration
enableCollaboration.description: Turn on real-time collaboration features for this notebook session

presenceIndicators.title: Presence indicators
presenceIndicators.description: Configuration for user presence and awareness features

showPresenceBar.title: Show collaboration bar
showPresenceBar.description: Display the collaboration bar with user avatars and connection status

showCursorPositions.title: Show cursor positions
showCursorPositions.description: Display real-time cursor positions and selections of collaborators

showUserAvatars.title: Show user avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display collaborator avatars in cells and presence indicators

maxVisibleUsers.title: Maximum visible users
maxVisibleUsers.description: Maximum number of user avatars to show before collapsing into overflow indicator

cursorUpdateInterval.title: Cursor update interval (ms)
cursorUpdateInterval.description: How often cursor position updates are sent to collaborators

presenceTimeout.title: Presence timeout (seconds)
presenceTimeout.description: How long before an inactive user is marked as away

defaultPolicy.title: Default locking policy
defaultPolicy.description: How cells should be locked during collaborative editing

autoLockTimeout.title: Auto-lock timeout (seconds)
autoLockTimeout.description: How long a cell remains locked after editing stops

showLockIndicators.title: Show lock indicators
showLockIndicators.description: Display visual indicators for locked cells

allowLockOverride.title: Allow lock override
allowLockOverride.description: Allow users with sufficient permissions to override cell locks

lockOnFocus.title: Lock on focus
lockOnFocus.description: Automatically lock cells when they gain focus in auto-lock mode

releaseLocksOnDisconnect.title: Release locks on disconnect
releaseLocksOnDisconnect.description: Automatically release all user locks when they disconnect

historyRetention.title: History retention settings
historyRetention.description: Configuration for change history and versioning

enableHistory.title: Enable version history
enableHistory.description: Track and store document version history

retentionDays.title: Retention period (days)
retentionDays.description: How long to keep version history data

maxVersions.title: Maximum versions
maxVersions.description: Maximum number of versions to retain per document

snapshotInterval.title: Snapshot interval (minutes)
snapshotInterval.description: How often to create version snapshots

showHistoryPanel.title: Show history panel
showHistoryPanel.description: Display the version history panel by default

trackCellLevelChanges.title: Track cell-level changes
trackCellLevelChanges.description: Record changes at the individual cell level for detailed history

defaultRole.title: Default role for new collaborators
defaultRole.description: The role assigned to new collaborators when they join

allowSelfRoleChange.title: Allow self role changes
allowSelfRoleChange.description: Allow users to change their own role (if they have permission)

showPermissionDialog.title: Show permission dialog
showPermissionDialog.description: Display permission management dialog in the UI

enforceStrictPermissions.title: Enforce strict permissions
enforceStrictPermissions.description: Strictly enforce permissions at the UI level

roles.title: Role definitions
roles.description: Configuration for permission roles and their capabilities

comments.title: Comment system settings
comments.description: Configuration for the comment and review system

enableComments.title: Enable comments
enableComments.description: Allow users to add comments to cells

commentVisibility.title: Comment visibility
commentVisibility.description: When to show comment indicators and threads

showCommentSidebar.title: Show comment sidebar
showCommentSidebar.description: Display the comment sidebar panel by default

autoResolveTimeout.title: Auto-resolve timeout (days)
autoResolveTimeout.description: Automatically resolve inactive comment threads after this period

maxCommentLength.title: Maximum comment length
maxCommentLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in a comment

enableNotifications.title: Enable notifications
enableNotifications.description: Show notifications for new comments and replies

autoReconnect.title: Auto-reconnect
autoReconnect.description: Automatically reconnect when connection is lost

reconnectInterval.title: Reconnect interval (seconds)
reconnectInterval.description: How long to wait between reconnection attempts

maxReconnectAttempts.title: Maximum reconnect attempts
maxReconnectAttempts.description: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat interval (seconds)
heartbeatInterval.description: How often to send keepalive messages

showConnectionStatus.title: Show connection status
showConnectionStatus.description: Display connection status in the collaboration bar

batchUpdates.title: Batch updates
batchUpdates.description: Batch multiple updates together for better performance

batchInterval.title: Batch interval (ms)
batchInterval.description: How long to wait before sending batched updates

compressionEnabled.title: Enable compression
compressionEnabled.description: Compress WebSocket messages for reduced bandwidth

maxDocumentSize.title: Maximum document size (MB)
maxDocumentSize.description: Maximum size limit for collaborative documents

throttleUpdates.title: Throttle updates
throttleUpdates.description: Throttle rapid updates to prevent overwhelming the server

ui.title: UI preferences
ui.description: User interface preferences for collaboration features

showWelcomeMessage.title: Show welcome message
showWelcomeMessage.description: Show welcome message when entering collaborative mode

confirmOnLeave.title: Confirm before leaving
confirmOnLeave.description: Ask for confirmation before leaving a collaborative session

highlightChanges.title: Highlight changes
highlightChanges.description: Highlight recent changes made by collaborators

changeHighlightDuration.title: Change highlight duration (seconds)
changeHighlightDuration.description: How long to highlight recent changes

animatePresence.title: Animate presence
animatePresence.description: Use animations for presence indicators and cursors

compactMode.title: Compact mode
compactMode.description: Use compact display for collaboration UI elements
